title.en: The strength of the Purple Ruin Worm is known t...

content.en:
The strength of the Purple Ruin Worm is known to these other level geniuses.

If there were a large number of Purple Ruin Insects hidden here, and they rashly went to collect the Purple Ruins Gold Liquid on the other side, it would be dangerous.

One by one, the Origin Realm Geniuses tried to probe the Will of the Origin Realm into the lake, but after the suppression of the mist of the Purple Mist Domain on the other side, coupled with the suppression of the Purple Ruin Gold Liquid on the other side, the Will of the Origin Realm was unable to explore the situation inside the lake at all.

Therefore, they were not sure if there were purple ruin insects in the Zixu Lake on the other side.

"I'll take a look!"

Ye Tian passed.

His strength is strong, and if he really encounters a large number of purple ruin insects, he can also retreat in time.

And the Lord of Mystery had already arranged the formation, and if they really encountered a large number of Purple Ruin Worms, they would also withdraw as soon as possible.

Wow!

Ye Tian came to the Zixu Lake on the other side and directly stirred the Zixu Lake on the other side.

The next moment.

One by one, the purple ruin insects came out of the purple ruin lake on the other side.

"Sure enough, there are purple ruin insects!"

Ye Tian unleashed his Endless Golden Arm, holding the Origin Rule weapon to attack these Purple Ruin Worms.

But because there were too many purple ruin insects, he couldn't bear it.

The Lord of Mystery had already retreated in an instant after discovering a large number of Purple Ruin Worms.

Even the Lord of the Dragon Lizard had to retreat, otherwise they would be finished with so many Purple Ruins Insects attacking.

After some time, the Lord of Mystery and the others came out of the Purple Mist Domain on the other side.

Subsequently.

They stayed away from the Purple Mist Domain on the other side, waiting for Ye Tian to come out.

Not long after, Ye Tian rushed out, and the Purple Ruin Worm did not pursue.

"Lord of Infinity, are you alright?"

The Lord of Mystery asked.

"It's okay!" Ye Tian shook his head, "But there are too many of those purple ruin insects, and I can't deal with them!"

"Do you want to give up?"

The Lord of the Dragons frowned.

It was a purple ruin gold liquid lake on the other side, once they obtained it, they could get a large amount of purple ruin gold liquid on the other side even according to their share!

It would be a shame to let them give up.

"Nature can't give up!"

The Lord of Mystery shook his head.

At this time, she looked at Ye Tian.

Whether or not you can get the purple ruin gold liquid on the other side depends on Ye Tian, and only Ye Tian's strength can hope to kill the purple ruin insect.

"Lord of Endless, can you harass the Purple Ruins Worms again and again, killing a few at a time, after a period of time, there should be hope to kill all the Purple Ruins Worms, right? "

The Lord of the Mysteries.

Ye Tian pondered for a moment, "I can try, but it's a bit dangerous to do so, once it's surrounded, it's not easy to escape." "

"Triple the pay!"

The Lord of Mystic gritted his teeth.

"Good!"

Ye Tian immediately agreed.

......

Subsequently, he entered the Purple Mist Domain on the other side, and the Lord of Xuan Miao did not follow up, after all, his plan was very dangerous, and it was naturally inconvenient for them to follow.

After entering the Purple Mist Domain on the other side, he did not rush to the Purple Ruin Lake on the other side, but began to copy his body.

He's going to replicate a second replica body here.

Before, he couldn't stay away for too long, so he didn't have time to replicate his replica body.

But now it's different, he can copy the second copy body, or even the third copy body, he can kill all the purple ruin insects in the purple ruin lake on the other side faster, and even intercept a part of the purple ruin gold liquid on the other side and hide it secretly, they can't find it.

If there are still some good things in it, he can also let the other replicas hide it.

Soon.

Three replicas of the body were successfully replicated.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian's three replica bodies came to the Purple Ruins Lake on the other side together.

Wow!!!!

A large number of purple ruin insects appeared, killing Ye Tian.

Ye Tian fought desperately, killing one purple ruin insect after another, and he was also injured, and his injuries were getting worse and worse.

But.

He didn't care about that and kept fighting.

The killing was almost done, so that after the two replica bodies were broken, one of the replica bodies retreated.

After the two replica bodies fell, he continued to copy the new duplicate bodies, and continued to go to the Purple Ruins Lake on the other side to fight against a large number of Purple Ruins insects.

Gradually, the number of purple ruin insects became smaller and smaller.

this day.

All the Purple Ruins were killed by him.

"It's finally done!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

Then, he entered the Zixu Lake on the other side and dived to the bottom of the lake.

Such a treasure land, there must be good things at the bottom of the lake.

Sure enough.

When he came to the bottom of the lake, he saw some purple-gold crystals.

"Definitely good stuff, put it away!"

He probed carefully, and there were probably hundreds of pieces of this purple-gold crystal material born in the entire Purple Ruins Lake on the other side.

He thought about it for a moment and decided to take it all.

Anyway, looking at those geniuses on the other side, they don't know much about the Zixu Lake on the other side, and they probably think that the Zixu Lake on the other side is all the Zixu gold liquid on the other side, and there will be nothing else.

Therefore, he took it away, and there was no problem.

After taking away these purple-gold crystal substances, he took some of the purple ruin gold liquid from the other side.

However, this makes the lake a little shallower and easier to see.

Thereupon.

He sank some soil, rocks, to the bottom of the lake.

In this way, the entire Zixu Lake on the other side looks almost the same as before, so there is no problem.

Anyway, they couldn't sense the situation at the bottom of the lake before, so naturally they didn't know what was going on.

Subsequently.

He erased all traces and could no longer be spied on.

Of course.

He didn't go out now, and if he did now, it would be too early.

So in the following days, he cultivated here, and the other replica bodies continued to look for other treasures in the Purple Mist Domain on the other side, such as the Purple Ruins Stone on the other side, how many can be found, they are all harvests!

After a while.

Ye Tian felt that the time was almost up, and then he injured himself, and the injury was not light, so he came out of the Purple Mist Domain on the other side.

......

"The Endless Lord is out!"

A genius at the other side said excitedly.

They had waited too long, and that time would be nothing in normal times.

But now I feel that time is very difficult.

The point is that they don't know how long Ye Tian will stay inside, when he will come out, and whether he will fall?

Fortunately, now that Ye Tian has come out, they will know the result.

"Lord of Endless, have you killed all those purple ruin insects?"

The Lord of the Mystic is desperate to know this.

"Killed!"

Ye Tian's words made her extremely excited, and the others were also ecstatic.

Whew!!!

This group of other shore-level geniuses couldn't wait to go to the Zixu Lake on the other side, for fear of delaying for a second.

Soon, they came here and saw the corpses of the purple ruin insects in one place.

But their eyes didn't look at the corpse of the Purple Ruin Insect, but focused on the Purple Ruin Gold Liquid Lake on the other side. ~
